# Cell 1
import requests
import json
import hashlib
import struct
import pyodbc
import pandas as pd
from datetime import date
from pyspark.sql.types import (
    StructType, StructField, StringType,
    DoubleType, ShortType, DateType
)
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

# Cell 2
def fetch_all_products():
    url = "https://dummyjson.com/products"
    limit = 30
    skip = 0
    all_products = []

    while True:
        resp = requests.get(f"{url}?limit={limit}&skip={skip}")
        resp.raise_for_status()
        data = resp.json()
        products = data.get("products", [])
        if not products:
            break
        all_products.extend(products)
        skip += limit
        if skip >= data.get("total", 0):
            break

    return all_products

raw_products = fetch_all_products()

today = str(date.today())
bronze_path = f"abfss://todaystask@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/products/{today}/products_raw.json"

mssparkutils.fs.put(bronze_path, json.dumps(raw_products, indent=2), overwrite=True)

raw_json = spark.read.text(bronze_path).collect()
raw_json = "".join([row.value for row in raw_json])
raw_products = json.loads(raw_json)

from pyspark.sql import Row
from datetime import date

def flatten_product(p):
    dim = p.get("dimensions", {})
    meta = p.get("meta", {})
    hash_key = hashlib.sha256(json.dumps({
        "product_id": p.get("id"),
        "price": p.get("price"),
        "stock": p.get("stock"),
        "discount_percentage": p.get("discountPercentage")
    }, sort_keys=True).encode()).hexdigest()

    return Row(
        product_id             = int(p.get("id", 0)),
        title                  = str(p.get("title", "") or ""),
        description            = str(p.get("description", "") or "")[:1000],
        category               = str(p.get("category", "") or ""),
        brand                  = str(p.get("brand", "") or ""),
        sku                    = str(p.get("sku", "") or ""),
        price                  = float(p.get("price", 0.0) or 0.0),
        discount_percentage    = float(p.get("discountPercentage", 0.0) or 0.0),
        rating                 = float(p.get("rating", 0.0) or 0.0),
        stock                  = int(p.get("stock", 0) or 0),
        availability_status    = str(p.get("availabilityStatus", "") or ""),
        minimum_order_quantity = int(p.get("minimumOrderQuantity", 1) or 1),
        weight                 = int(p.get("weight", 0) or 0),
        depth                  = float(dim.get("depth", 0.0) or 0.0),
        height                 = float(dim.get("height", 0.0) or 0.0),
        width                  = float(dim.get("width", 0.0) or 0.0),
        warranty_information   = str(p.get("warrantyInformation", "") or ""),
        shipping_information   = str(p.get("shippingInformation", "") or ""),
        return_policy          = str(p.get("returnPolicy", "") or ""),
        barcode                = str(meta.get("barcode", "") or ""),
        thumbnail              = str(p.get("thumbnail", "") or "")[:500],
        created_at             = str(meta.get("createdAt", "") or ""),
        updated_at             = str(meta.get("updatedAt", "") or ""),
        load_date              = date.today(),
        source_system          = "dummyjson",
        hash_key               = hash_key
    )

rows = [flatten_product(p) for p in raw_products]

# Cell 5
schema = StructType([
    StructField("product_id",              ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("title",                   StringType(), True),
    StructField("description",             StringType(), True),
    StructField("category",                StringType(), True),
    StructField("brand",                   StringType(), True),
    StructField("sku",                     StringType(), True),
    StructField("price",                   DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("discount_percentage",     DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("rating",                  DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("stock",                   ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("availability_status",     StringType(), True),
    StructField("minimum_order_quantity",  ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("weight",                  ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("depth",                   DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("height",                  DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("width",                   DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("warranty_information",    StringType(), True),
    StructField("shipping_information",    StringType(), True),
    StructField("return_policy",           StringType(), True),
    StructField("barcode",                 StringType(), True),
    StructField("thumbnail",               StringType(), True),
    StructField("created_at",              StringType(), True),
    StructField("updated_at",              StringType(), True),
    StructField("load_date",               DateType(),   True),
    StructField("source_system",           StringType(), True),
    StructField("hash_key",                StringType(), True),
])

df = spark.createDataFrame(rows, schema=schema)

import struct
import pyodbc
import pandas as pd

token = mssparkutils.credentials.getToken("DW")
token_bytes = token.encode("UTF-8")
exptoken = b"".join([bytes([b, 0]) for b in token_bytes])
tokenstruct = struct.pack("=i", len(exptoken)) + exptoken

conn = pyodbc.connect(
    "Driver={ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server};"
    "Server=tayyabspace.sql.azuresynapse.net,1433;"
    "Database=Tayyabdedicatedpool;"
    "Encrypt=yes;"
    "TrustServerCertificate=no;",
    attrs_before={1256: tokenstruct},
    autocommit=True
)

cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE stg_products")

pandas_df = df.toPandas()
cols = ", ".join(pandas_df.columns)
placeholders = ", ".join(["?" for _ in pandas_df.columns])
insert_sql = f"INSERT INTO stg_products ({cols}) VALUES ({placeholders})"

cursor.fast_executemany = True
cursor.executemany(insert_sql, pandas_df.values.tolist())

cursor.close()
conn.close()
